item.title: NLP-RAG1200
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Experimental NLP workflow combining preprocessing, retrieval, and model comparison on neural-bridge/rag-dataset-12000.

item.title: Lung Cancer Classification
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Medical-imaging project comparing binary and five-class lung malignancy pipelines across full and zoomed CT slices.

item.title: OLA Project: Dynamic Pricing and Bidding
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Simulation-based online learning project covering stochastic, auction, and non-stationary decision settings.

item.title: SE2 Project: Requirements and System Design
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Documentation-focused software engineering project covering requirements, architecture, UML artifacts, and Alloy models.

item.title: Brain Stroke Prediction: Replication and Critical Evaluation
item.author: albertoeusebio72@gmail.com (Alberto Eusebio)
item.description: Reproducibility study of a stroke-risk prediction paper using classical ML with rigorous evaluation protocol analysis

item.description: ESP32 and MQTT telemetry system for race-condition monitoring in high-speed streamliners
